hyperedges.label: Pipeline prix marché quotidien → app/Excel
Synchro bidirectionnelle Excel ↔ Google Sheet
Capture ticket → OCR/IA → formulaire
Scan ticket: Gemini principal + repli Tesseract OCR + stockage Drive
Sync bidirectionnelle Excel <-> GAS <-> Google Sheets via sync_id
Relevé prix quotidien -> _PrixHistory -> alerte Web Push
Pipeline scan ticket OCR (Gemini + Tesseract + Drive)
Flux de synchronisation Excel ↔ Google Sheets
Flux relevé prix secteur + alertes push
Vite build -> Pages artifact -> GitHub Pages deploy
PWA/Excel <-> doPost <-> _ImportGS Sheet sync flow
